description: Solidity interface files and a minimal complete multichain contract for Push Chain. Import the interfaces you need or use MyMultichainApp.sol as a starting point.
setup: Copy .sol files into your contracts/ directory. For Foundry: forge install pushchain/push-chain-core-contracts

files.purpose: Interface for the UEA Factory precompile — getOriginForUEA, getUEAForOrigin, UniversalAccountId struct
Interface + struct for the UGPC precompile — sendUniversalTxOutbound, UniversalOutboundTxRequest
Interface for UniversalCore — fee estimates, gas price reads, chain height reads
Minimal complete contract — UGPC dispatch + inbound executeUniversalTx callback with replay protection
Foundry project config — RPC endpoints for Push Chain Donut Testnet, remappings
